flags.reason: Privacy browser — generally positive, but verify extensions
Google service — data processed on Google servers
Zoom: known for aggressive data collection & microphone access
Wallpaper apps often request unnecessary permissions & track users
Financial app — high-value target for attackers, ensure 2FA is on
Google service — cloud storage, data leaves device
Voice recorder with microphone access — verify it's not uploading recordings
AI image app — review what data it uploads to servers
Crypto app — verify legitimacy, not a well-known publisher
